title: The Hershey Company
content:
The Hershey Company is a multinational confectionery and food company headquartered in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. Founded in 1894 by Milton Hershey, the company has grown to become one of the largest and most recognizable brands in the world. The Hershey Company produces a wide variety of chocolate and non-chocolate products, including the iconic Hershey's Milk Chocolate bars, Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, KitKat, Twizzlers, and many more. Its products are sold in more than 60 countries around the world.

The Hershey Company has a long history of innovation and entrepreneurship. Milton Hershey, the company's founder, started out as a candy maker in the late 1800s and became fascinated with chocolate making after attending the 1893 World's Columbian Exposition in Chicago. He purchased the necessary equipment and began experimenting with chocolate recipes, eventually creating the formula for Hershey's Milk Chocolate.

In addition to its popular chocolate products, The Hershey Company is also committed to sustainability and social responsibility. The company has set ambitious sustainability goals, including achieving zero net greenhouse gas emissions by 2050, and has made significant investments in renewable energy, sustainable sourcing, and waste reduction. The Hershey Company is also committed to improving the lives of the people who produce its products. Through its Cocoa For Good program, the company is working to improve the lives of cocoa farmers and their families by providing access to education, healthcare, and economic opportunities. The program also aims to promote responsible cocoa sourcing and sustainable farming practices.

In recent years, The Hershey Company has expanded its product offerings beyond traditional candy, launching new lines of snack foods and beverages. In 2020, the company acquired the ONE Brands protein bar company, adding a new category to its portfolio. Overall, The Hershey Company has had a profound impact on the confectionery industry and on American culture. Its iconic brands and innovative products have delighted consumers for over a century, while its commitment to sustainability and social responsibility is setting a positive example for other companies to follow. With a strong brand and a clear vision for the future, The Hershey Company is poised for continued success in the years to come.

When was The Hershey Company founded and by whom?

The Hershey Company was founded in 1894 by Milton Hershey, who became passionate about chocolate making after visiting the 1893 World's Columbian Exposition in Chicago. He designed and purchased the necessary chocolate-making equipment and went on to create the beloved Hershey's Milk Chocolate formula that remains popular today, particularly within the American candy Australia category.
